---
title: "STAT443 project"
author: "Amy Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(forecast)
# Load the training and test datasets
train <- read.csv("DailyDelhiClimateTrain (1).csv")
test <- read.csv("DailyDelhiClimateTest (1).csv")

# Convert date
train$date <- as.Date(train$date)
test$date  <- as.Date(test$date)

# Create Time Series objects for the daily mean temperature
train_ts <- ts(train$meantemp, start=c(2013, 1), frequency=365)
test_ts  <- ts(test$meantemp, start=c(2017, 1), frequency=365)
```


```{r}
# 1. Average (IID)
mean_val <- mean(train_ts)
mean_fc <- rep(mean_val, length(test_ts))
rmse_mean <- sqrt(mean((test_ts - mean_fc)^2))


# 2. Persistence (Moving 1-step)
persist_fc <- numeric(length(test_ts))
persist_fc[1] <- tail(train_ts, 1)
for (i in 2:length(test_ts)) {
  persist_fc[i] <- test_ts[i-1]
}
rmse_persist <- sqrt(mean((test_ts - persist_fc)^2))


# 3. Simple Exponential Smoothing (Moving 1-step)
full_ts <- ts(c(train$meantemp, test$meantemp))
ses_train <- HoltWinters(train_ts, beta = FALSE, gamma = FALSE)
ses_full <- HoltWinters(full_ts,
                        alpha = ses_train$alpha,
                        beta = FALSE,
                        gamma = FALSE)
ses_moving_fc <- window(fitted(ses_full)[, "xhat"],
                        start = length(train_ts) + 1)
rmse_ses_moving <- sqrt(mean((as.numeric(test_ts) - as.numeric(ses_moving_fc))^2))


# 4. Additive Seasonal Exponential Smoothing (Moving 1-step)
full_ts <- ts(c(train$meantemp, test$meantemp), frequency = 365)
hw_train <- HoltWinters(train_ts, seasonal = "additive")
hw_full <- HoltWinters(full_ts,
                       alpha = hw_train$alpha,
                       beta  = hw_train$beta,
                       gamma = hw_train$gamma,
                       seasonal = "additive")
hw_moving_fc <- tail(fitted(hw_full)[, "xhat"], length(test_ts))
rmse_hw_moving <- sqrt(mean((as.numeric(test_ts) - as.numeric(hw_moving_fc))^2))


# 5. Compare RMSE of all models
results <- data.frame(
  Model = c("Mean (IID)", "Persistence", "SES (1-step moving)", "Holt-Winters (Additive)"),
  RMSE  = c(rmse_mean, rmse_persist, rmse_ses_moving, rmse_hw_moving)
)
print(results)
```


```{r}
# Compare all models' TS plots with Forecast v.s Actual
iid_fc_ts       <- ts(mean_fc, start=start(test_ts), frequency=frequency(test_ts))
persist_fc_ts   <- ts(persist_fc, start=start(test_ts), frequency=frequency(test_ts))
ses_fc_ts       <- ts(ses_moving_fc, start=start(test_ts), frequency=frequency(test_ts))
hw_fc_ts        <- ts(hw_moving_fc, start=start(test_ts), frequency=frequency(test_ts))


par(mfrow = c(2, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))


plot(test_ts, main="IID Mean", 
     ylab="Mean Temp (°C)", xlab="Time (2017)", lwd=2)
lines(iid_fc_ts, col="red", lwd=2, lty=2)
legend("topleft", legend=c("Actual Test Data", "Forecast"), 
       col=c("black", "red"), lty=c(1,2), lwd=2, bty="n")


plot(test_ts, main="Persistence", 
     ylab="Mean Temp (°C)", xlab="Time (2017)", lwd=2)
lines(persist_fc_ts, col="red", lwd=2, lty=2)
legend("topleft", legend=c("Actual Test Data", "Forecast"), 
       col=c("black", "red"), lty=c(1,2), lwd=2, bty="n")


plot(test_ts, main="SES (1-step)", 
     ylab="Mean Temp (°C)", xlab="Time (2017)", lwd=2)
lines(ses_fc_ts, col="red", lwd=2, lty=2)
legend("topleft", legend=c("Actual Test Data", "Forecast"), 
       col=c("black", "red"), lty=c(1,2), lwd=2, bty="n")


plot(test_ts, main="Holt-Winters (Additive)", 
     ylab="Mean Temp (°C)", xlab="Time (2017)", lwd=2)
lines(hw_fc_ts, col="red", lwd=2, lty=2)
legend("topleft", legend=c("Actual Test Data", "Forecast"), 
       col=c("black", "red"), lty=c(1,2), lwd=2, bty="n")
```

```{r}
ses_residuals <- as.numeric(test_ts) - as.numeric(ses_moving_fc)
acf(ses_residuals, 
    main = "ACF of SES (1-step) Residuals")
```


```{r}
# Summary Statistics
vars <- c("meantemp", "humidity", "wind_speed", "meanpressure")
cat("--- Basic Summary Statistics ---\n")
print(summary(train[, vars]))
cat("\n--- Standard Deviations ---\n")
print(sapply(train[, vars], sd, na.rm=TRUE))
```

```{r}
# Visual Diagnostics: Time Series Plot
plot(train_ts, 
     main="Daily Mean Temperature in Delhi (2013 - 2017)", 
     ylab="Mean Temperature (°C)", 
     xlab="Time (Years)", 
     xlim=c(2013, 2017.4), 
     ylim=c(0, 50), 
     lwd=1)
lines(test_ts, col="red", lwd=2)
legend("topleft", 
       legend=c("Training Set", "Test Set (Jan-Apr 2017)"), 
       col=c("black", "red"), 
       lty=1, 
       lwd=c(1,2), 
       bty="n", 
       cex=0.9)


# Visual Diagnostics: ACF Plot
acf(train_ts, 
    lag.max=730, 
    main="ACF of Daily Mean Temperature (Training Data)",
    xlab="Lag (Years)", 
    ylab="Autocorrelation",
    col=rgb(0, 0, 0, alpha=0.5))
```
